questions.question: Count the apples in the picture. How many apples are there?
Count the circles and write the total number.
Calculate: 3 + 4 = ?
Complete the pattern: Red Circle, Blue Circle, Red Circle, ?
If a pencil is 8 centimeters long and we cut 3 centimeters off, how long is it now?
Look at the clock. If the short hand points to 3 and the long hand points to 12, what hour is it?
Ramu has a pizza cut into 4 equal slices. He eats 1 slice. What fraction of the pizza is left?
You buy a toy for 15 rupees and give the shopkeeper a 50-rupee note. How many rupees do you get back?
Multiply: 12 x 5 = ?
In a class there are 5 benches. Each bench holds 4 students. How many students can sit in total?
Divide: 48 / 6 = ?
If July 1st is a Monday, what day of the week is July 8th?
[For Amanpreet Singh - Level 2] Count the apples...

evaluationReports.narrative: Amanpreet demonstrated absolute competence in counting objects and doing simple addition arithmetic.
Sandeep exhibits strong capacity to compute lengths and carry out simple subtraction comparisons.
Rajiv displays flawless sequencing and pattern recognition matching Level 3 descriptors.
Kavya shows strength in counting and measurement but needs more practice with money transactions.
Anika demonstrated flawless pattern recognition and multiplication skills.
Pooja displays strong conceptual understanding of fractions and monetary calculations.
Tanvi performed very well on the diagnostic, demonstrating strong number sense.

tickets.subject: Ambiguous wording in Level 3 patterns question
tickets.description: The shapes used in the patterns question of Level 3 are hard for Class 2 children to identify. Recommend replacing with simpler fruit SVGs.

tickets.subject: Measurement Level 3 cuts question difficulty
tickets.description: The pencil cutting subtraction is highly appropriate but students need concrete centimeter rulers to visualize better. Can we suggest visual graphics?

tickets.subject: Delay in receiving printed worksheets for Bathinda school
tickets.description: The printed worksheets for Class 3 students in Bathinda have not arrived. Please check logistics.

tickets.subject: Level 8 subtraction questions too advanced for Class 2
tickets.description: Some students placed at Level 8 are struggling with subtraction with borrowing. Suggest revisiting the difficulty curve.

tickets.subject: Volunteer access to diagnostic tools in Moga village
tickets.description: Unable to generate diagnostic worksheets for students at GPS Rural Village Moga. Access restricted.

announcements.title: Mid-Year Assessment Cycle Starts Next Week
announcements.message: All district coordinators and school principals are requested to complete student rosters and run onboarding diagnostics. The Mid-year paper generation will unlock on July 12th.

announcements.title: Bathinda District Performance Alert
announcements.message: Bathinda district is flagged as lagging with only 38% average certification rate. All block admins must prioritize remedial interventions in low-strength schools.

announcements.title: New Teacher Onboarding Training Sessions
announcements.message: Virtual training sessions for newly onboarded teachers will be held on July 15-16, 2026. Attendance is mandatory for all teachers from new schools.
